hotels.name: The Alamo Guest House
hotels.description_fr:
Cette maison d'hôtes 4 étoiles occupe un bâtiment victorien du XIXe siècle donnant sur le parc Kelvingrove et offrant une vue imprenable sur Glasgow. Situé à seulement 20 minutes à pied du centre de Glasgow, l'Alamo Guest House se trouve dans le West End, à proximité de Sauchiehall et des bars et restaurants de la rue Argyle.
Toutes les chambres sont dotées d'un mobilier d'époque et d'une salle de bains privative séparée.
Lors de votre séjour à l'Alamo Guest House, vous pourrez savourer un petit-déjeuner gratuit composé de fruits frais, de viennoiseries et d'un petit-déjeuner chaud cuisiné.
Vous rejoindrez la gare centrale de Glasgow en 25 minutes à pied, le SECC Arena en 20 minutes de marche et les jardins botaniques de Glasgow en 25 minutes de marche.

This 4-star guest house is set within a 19th-century Victorian building overlooking Kelvingrove Park with excellent views across Glasgow. Only 20 minute walk from Glasgow’s centre, the Alamo Guest House sits within the West End, close to Sauchiehall and Argyle Streets restaurants and bars.
All rooms boast antique period furnishings, with ensuite bathroom facilities in all rooms except Shetland which offers a private external bathroom facility.
Guests at The Alamo Guest House can enjoy complementary breakfast, including fresh fruit, pastries, and cooked hot breakfast.
Nearby is Glasgow Central Railway Station is 25 minutes’ walk away , the SECC Arena is 20 minutes’ walk and Glasgow Botanic Gardens are a 25-minute walk away.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.

hotels.name: Mallyan Spout Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
Niché au cœur de charmants jardins, le Mallyan Spout Hotel occupe une maison de campagne datant du XIXe siècle offrant une vue sur la vallée d'Esk. Une petite promenade vous mènera à la cascade Mallyan Spout, derrière l'établissement.
Présentant une décoration moderne, les chambres spacieuses offrent toutes une vue sur les jardins de l'hôtel, l'église du village ou la vallée d'Esk. Chacune d'entre elles possède une salle de bains privative, une télévision à écran plat, un sèche-cheveux et une cafetière.
Les plats du dîner sont composés de produits frais locaux et de poisson provenant de Whitby. Vous les savourerez dans la salle à manger, dont le menu à la carte est varié, ou au bar, dégageant une atmosphère décontractée. Les trois salons ornés d'une cheminée sont propices à la détente.
hotels.description_en:
The Mallyan Spout is a 19th-century country house set within picturesque gardens with views across the Esk valley. Just a short walk behind the hotel is Mallyan Spout waterfall.
All of the modern, spacious rooms at The Mallyan Spout are decorated with en suite bathrooms and views of the hotel gardens, the village church, or the Esk Valley. All rooms also feature flat-screen TVs, hairdryers, and tea and coffee-making facilities.
Dining at The Mallyan Spout is provided with fresh, locally-sourced produce and Whitby fish, served either in the dining room with its varied á la carte menu, or the more informal bar area. Three lounges with log fires are also available for guests to relax in.
hotels.description_es:
El The Mallyan Spout ocupa una casa rural del siglo XIX situada entre jardines pintorescos con vistas al valle del Esk. La cascada de Mallyan Spout se encuentra a pocos pasos, detrás del establecimiento.
Las habitaciones del The Mallyan Spout son modernas y amplias, y están equipadas con baño y vistas a los jardines del hotel, la iglesia de la localidad o el valle del Esk. Las habitaciones cuentan con TV de pantalla plana, secador de pelo y set de té y café.
El The Mallyan Spout sirve una cena con productos frescos de origen local y pescado de Whitby en el comedor, que tiene una carta variada, y en la zona de bar, de ambiente más informal. Además, hay 3 salones con chimenea, perfectos para relajarse.
hotels.description_pt:
O Mallyan Spout é uma casa de campo do século XIX, situada entre jardins pitorescos com vistas sobre o Vale de Esk. A Cascata Mallyan Spout encontra-se a uma curta caminhada por trás do hotel.
Todos os modernos e espaçosos quartos do The Mallyan Spout estão decorados com casas de banho privativas e oferecem vistas para os jardins do hotel, para a igreja da vila ou para o Vale Esk. Todos os quartos também dispõem de televisões de ecrã plano, secadores de cabelo e comodidades para preparar chá e café.
As refeições no The Mallyan Spout são confeccionadas com produtos frescos de origem local e peixe Whitby, servidos na sala de refeições com o seu variado menu à carta ou a área de bar mais informal. Também estão disponíveis 3 salões com lareiras para os hóspedes relaxarem.
hotels.description_it:
The Mallyan Spout Hotel occupa una casa di campagna del XIX secolo circondata da un pittoresco giardino con vista sulla Esk Valley, a pochi passi dalla cascata Mallyan Spout.
Affacciate sui giardini dell'hotel, sulla chiesa del paesino o sulla Esk Valley, tutte le spaziose e moderne camere del Mallyan Spout sono dotate di un bagno interno, di una TV a schermo piatto, di un asciugacapelli e di un set per la preparazione di tè/caffè.
Al Mallyan Spout gusterete prodotti freschi di provenienza locale e il pesce di Whitby, serviti nella sala ristorazione con il suo variegato menù alla carta o nella più informale area bar. Per i momenti di relax sono inoltre disponibili 3 sale con caminetti.

hotels.name: Stage House Bed & Breakfast
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à proximité du Loch Shiel et à 10 minutes à pied du viaduc de Glenfinnan et du National Trust Visitor Centre, le Stage House Bed & Breakfast (anciennement Prince's House Hotel) occupe un bâtiment historique datant de 1658.  Il est situé à 17 km de Fort William et à 5 minutes à pied de la gare de Glenfinnan.  Le port de Mallaig, d'où partent les ferries à destination des Hébrides intérieures et de l'île de Skye, est accessible en une demi-heure de route.  

Chaque chambre du Stage House dispose d'une salle de bains privative.  Certaines chambres offrent une vue sur les montagnes environnantes.  Votre petit-déjeuner fraîchement préparé est servi à côté de la petite rivière qui passe juste devant la fenêtre.
hotels.description_en:
Situated close to Loch Shiel and a 10 minute walk to Glenfinnan Viaduct and the National Trust Visitor Centre, Stage House Bed & Breakfast (formerly Prince's House Hotel) is a historic building dating back to 1658.  It is located 17 miles from Fort William and is a 5 minute walk from Glenfinnan railway station.  The port of Mallaig, with ferries to the Inner Hebrides and Isle of Skye is half an hour's drive away.  

Each room at the Stage House has an en suite bathroom.  Some rooms boast views of the surrounding mountains.  Your freshly cooked breakfast is served next to the small river that runs right past the window.  Facilities also include a residents cosy lounge with honesty bar and a separate games room including pool table.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.

The extensively-refurbished Bridge House Hotel is set in Grasmere, directly across from St Oswalds Church and the graveyard where William Wordsworth rests. The hotel sits in its own mature grounds, with beautiful views overlooking the River Rothay.
The hotel has an Art Deco design and is set in an elegant Edwardian house with some period features. All bedrooms feature en-suite bathrooms complimented with luxury Bath House toiletries. Most rooms also offer stunning views of the river Rothay or the scenic fells.
Guests are welcomed with cream tea with homemade scones and cakes upon arrival and the pantry offers complimentary tea/coffee also with homemade cookies.
Each morning, the hotel offers a hearty breakfast.
